title: Remove the empty help-fingerprint-repro worktree and unregister its grant
action: PBI-040 was re-verified as not a bug (stale binary). The worktree ../herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro (branch wt/help-fingerprint-repro) has zero commits of its own -- nothing to merge. Remove it: `git worktree remove /home/vantt/projects/herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro`, then `git branch -d wt/help-fingerprint-repro`, then `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree unregister --id herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro`.

truths: git worktree list no longer shows herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro
bee worktree list --json no longer carries a grant for herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro
prohibitions: Do not touch src/ or any product file
Do not force-delete anything with uncommitted changes -- confirm the worktree is clean first

verify: ! git worktree list | grep -q 'wt--help-fingerprint-repro' && ! git branch --list wt/help-fingerprint-repro | grep -q . && ! node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -q help-fingerprint-repro && echo CLEANUP_OK

trace.outcome: Removed empty herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro worktree, deleted wt/help-fingerprint-repro branch, unregistered worktree grant
trace.verify_command: ! git worktree list | grep -q 'wt--help-fingerprint-repro' && ! git branch --list wt/help-fingerprint-repro | grep -q . && ! node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -q help-fingerprint-repro && echo CLEANUP_OK
